chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ يُكْرَهُ لَبَنُهُ وَ مَنْ لَا يُكْرَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 30 – The one whose milk is disliked, and the one whose milk is not disliked

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/76)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/76)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا أَرْضَعْنَ لَكُمْ فَامْنَعُوهُنَّ مِنْ شُرْبِ الْخَمْرِ.

en.hubeali: And from him, from Al Kahily, from Abdullah Bin Hilal who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When they breast-feed for you, so forbid them from drinking the wine’.
en.sarwar: 3. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from al-Kahiliy from ‘Abd Allah ibn Hilal who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When they breastfeed for you do not allow them to drink wine.’”
